prompt: Create a dynamic high energy drink advertisement for "SURGE" brand. Person wearing: Neon yellow and black premium athletic sportswear, energy and power radiating. Pose: Mid explosive jump in air, fist raised powerfully, giant oversized energy drink can prop exploding with electric sparks and liquid splash dramatically around him. Background: Deep black background with electric blue and neon yellow lightning bolt effects, massive bold condensed typography "SURGE" in neon yellow filling background. Product: Energy drink can shown bottom left corner with flavor and stats visible. Tagline bottom center in bold neon yellow font: "Fuel your unstoppable." Top right watermark: "Designed with GPT image 2" Floor: Dark reflective floor with electric yellow neon light pools glowing beneath. Lighting: High energy electric strobe lighting with motion blur, ultra dynamic cinematic. Style: Monster Energy, Red Bull campaign level. Quality: Ultra HD 8K photorealistic, portrait 3:4 ratio.
